freezeTip.message: Tizim bu akkaunt {names} da o'ylash/ noto'g'ri xatti-harakatlarni aniqladi. Akkaunt qulflangan. Iltimos, o'qituvchingiz yoki platforma administratoriga murojaat qiling.

overErrorTimes.message: Siz 5 marta urundingiz va akkaunt qulflangan. Iltimos, 3 daqiqadan keyin qayta urinib ko'ring.

faceSuccess.message: Sizning yuz identifikatingiz tasdiqlandi va imtihon 3 soniyadan keyin boshlanadi.

noCameraTip.message: Kamera ishlatilmoqda yoki unga kirish taqiqlangan. Iltimos, kamerani ishlatayotgan dasturni yoping va/yoki ULearningga kamera kirishini ruxsat bering.

notSupportTip.message: Bu imtihon veb ishtirokchilikka qo'llab-quvvatlamaydi. Iltimos, imtihonda ishtirok etish uchun belgilangan imtihon qurilmasi turidan foydalaning.

noFaceTip.message: Ushbu imtihon uchun yuz tasdiqlash yoqilgan va siz yuz tasdiqlashni tugatgandan so'ng imtihonda ishtirok etishingiz mumkin.

lateLimitTip.message: Imtihon boshlanganidan {min} daqiqadan keyin imtihonda ishtirok etishga ruxsat berilmaydi

submitLimitType.message: Imtihon boshlanganidan {min} daqiqaga qadar imtihon natijasini yuborishga ruxsat berilmaydi

deviceMonitorTip.message: {deviceMonitor} yoqilgan - Imtihon davomida boshqa qurilmaga yoki brauzerga o'tmang!

ipMonitorTip.message: {ipMonitor} yoqilgan - Imtihon davomida boshqa tarmoqqa o'tmang!

cutScreenMonitorTip1.message: {cutScreenMonitor} yoqilgan - Agar talabalar imtihon ekranidan boshqa ekran/ilovaga bir marta {s} soniyadan ko'p vaqt bo'lgan yoki {times} martadan ortiq o'tadilar bo'lsa, imtihon o'z-o'zidan yuboriladi!

cutScreenMonitorTip2.message: {cutScreenMonitor} yoqilgan - Agar talabalar imtihon ekranidan boshqa ekran/ilovaga {times} martadan ortiq o'tadilar bo'lsa, imtihon o'z-o'zidan yuboriladi!

cutScreenMonitorTip3.message: {cutScreenMonitor} yoqilgan - Agar talabalar imtihon ekranidan boshqa ekran/ilovaga bir marta {s} soniyadan ko'p vaqt bo'lgan o'tadilar bo'lsa, imtihon o'z-o'zidan yuboriladi!

faceMonitorTip.message: {faceMonitor} yoqilgan - Imtihonni boshlash uchun yuz tasdiqlashdan o'tishingiz kerak!

cameraMonitorTip.message: {cameraMonitor} yoqilgan - Imtihon davomida old kamerani doimiy ravishda yoqib turib turing!

noPermissionTip.message: Siz bu imtihonda ishtirok etishga vakolatlangan emassiz. Agar savollaringiz bo'lsa, iltimos, imtihon tashkilotchisi bilan bog'laning.

multipleSessions.message: This exam contains multiple sessions. Please log in to view the sessions and exam time you can   participate in.

windowsTip.message: Windows 7 va undan yuqori versiyalarni qo'llab-quvvatlaydi

macTip.message: macOS10.11 va undan yuqori versiyalarni qo'llab-quvvatlaydi

deviceAbnormalityTip.message: Qurilma kuzatuvi yoqilgan va imtihon davomida qurilmni yoki brauzerni o'zgartirib bo'lmaydi. Iltimos, savollarga javob berish uchun birinchi marta imtihonga kirgan qurilmani yoki brauzerni ishlating.

ipAbnormalityTip.message: IP kuzatuvi yoqilgan. Talabalar imtihon davomida boshqa tarmoqqa o'tishga ruxsat berilmaydi (tarmoqni almashtirish IP manzilining o'zgarishiga olib kelishi mumkin).

useCodeTip.message: Agar maxsus holatlarda qurilmani/brauzerni o'zgartirishingiz kerak bo'lsa, iltimos, nazoratchidan tasdiqlash kodini so'rang va imtihonga kirish uchun {useCode} dan foydalaning.

faceVerificationTip.message: Siz yuz tasdiqlashni tugatmadingiz va yuz tasdiqlash orqali imtihonda ishtirok etishingiz mumkin emas.

useCodeEnter.message: Imtihonga kirish uchun tasdiqlash kodidan foydalaning

agreenExamNotes.message: Men imtihon ko'rsatmalaridagi punktlarni o'qidim va roziman

faceVerificationDesc.message: Iltimos, kameraga qarang va etarli yorug'lik borligiga ishonch hosil qiling. Yuz tasdiqlashni bajarolmayapsizmi?

examCodeTip.message: O'qituvchingizdan yoki nazoratchidan tasdiqlash kodini so'rang va quyidagi kodni kiriting.

cameraMonitorDesc.message: Kamera kuzatuvchi yoqilgandan so'ng, tizim sizning o'rindan ketish, ko'zni boshqa tomonga tortish, boshqalar bilan suhbat qilish kabi shubhali xatti-harakatlaringizni aniqlaydi va yozib oladi. Iltimos, ishonch hosil qiling: {br}1. Kerakli holda kamerani sozlash, shunda siz imtihon qurilmasi oldida o'tirishda bosh/yuzingiz kameraning ko'rinishida to'liq paydo bo'lishadi. {br}2. Imtihon davomida ko'zlaringizni imtihon ekraniga qaratib turing, o'rindan matdaning va boshqalar bilan suhbat qilmaymang.

ipPermissionsTip.message: Current IP {ip} does not have access to the exam -  Please use the specified device to take the exam!

lateTip.message: Siz ruxsat etilgan kechikish vaqtidan o'tganligingiz sababli imtihonda ishtirok etishga ruxsat berilmaydi.

noCameraTip1.message: Bu imtihon uchun yuz tasdiqlash yoqilgan va iltimos, imtihonda ishtirok etish uchun old kamerali qurilmani ishlating.

noCameraTip2.message: Bu imtihon uchun kamera kuzatuvchi yoqilgan va iltimos, imtihonda ishtirok etish uchun old kamerali qurilmani ishlating.

expireTip.message: Kirish vaqti tugadi, iltimos, qayta kirish!

ltiTip1.message: Agar siz ULearning APP yoki ULearning Lockdown Browser orqali imtihonda ishtirok etishni xohlasangiz, U-Test akkauntingiz bilan kirishingiz mumkin. Sizning foydalanuvchi nomingiz: {loginName}, boshlang'ich parol foydalanuvchi nomi bilan bir xil.

accountTipContent.message: ULearning Imtihon Tizimiga xush kelibsiz. Biz siz uchun ULearning akkaunti ro'yxatdan o'tkazdik. Agar siz mobil qurilma orqali imtihonda ishtirok etishni xohlasangiz, iltimos, ULearning APP ni yuklab oling (agar siz buni qilmagan bo'lsangiz) va keyin ULearning akkauntingiz bilan kirishingiz.

passwordTip.message: Boshlang'ich parol foydalanuvchi nomi bilan bir xil, kirgandan so'ng parolni o'zgartirishingiz mumkin.

openAppTip.message: Agar ULearning APP muvaffaqiyatli ishga tushmasa, iltimos, u o'rnatilganligini tekshiring. Agar u hali o'rnatilmagan bo'lsa, iltimos, avval uni yuklab oling va o'rnating.

transcodeTip.message: Fayl kodlanmoqda, iltimos, keyinroq qayta urinib ko'ring.

transcodeTip1.message: The file is being transcoded, please try again later

recordingTip.message: Yana bitta audio yozib olish jarayonida, iltimos, avval uni yoping.

noRecordingTip.message: Yozib olishga kirish o'chirilgan. Brauzer sozlamalarida uni yoqing.

uploadAudioFail.message: Yozib olishni yuklash muvaffaqiyatsiz - Iltimos, tarmoq ulanishini tekshiring

playTimesError.message: Error - The number of plays is incorrect

answerCanChangeTip.message: The answers for the blanks do not need to be in order.

enableUploadTip.message: When publishing the exam, you can choose whether to allow students to upload attachments

inputAnswerTip2.message: For multiple correct answers, please use "//" to separate them

answerTip.message: The answers for the blanks do not need to be in order

inputFormulaTip1.message: The formula length needs to be between 1 and {n} characters

inputDeviationTip.message: The error needs to be between 0-{n}

readTextTip1.message: Ovozli o'qish mazmuni bo'sh bo'lishi mumkin emas

readTextTip2.message: Ovozli o'qish mazmuni {n} so'zdan oshmasligi kerak

completeRemarkTip.message: Congratulations! All students in your class have been graded

remarkTip.message: Question {n} is not graded, save it now?

batchEditTimes.message: Har bir audio uchun ijro soni

inputPartName.message: Click to enter the section name

paperUsedTip1.message: This exam is in use. Only the question stem, answers, and points can be edited. The exam structure cannot be modified. Don't add/delete questions or sub-questions (for combination questions). {br}If the question answers or points is changed, re-grade the exam.

previewTip.message: Add at least one question to each section to save or preview it.

previewTip1.message: Question {n} is not saved - please save the question first

addPartTip.message: Add up to {n} sections per exam.

deletePartTip.message: Deleting a section will delete all questions in that section. Newly created section questions won't be saved to the question bank and cannot be undone after deletion, so please use caution with deletion. Are you sure you want to delete it?

addPartQuestionTip.message: No more than {n} questions per section.

confirmCancelEdit.message: Are you sure to cancel the modification?

confirmDeleteQuestion.message: Are you sure you want to delete this question?

exitTip.message: The exam has not been saved.  If you exit now, the new questions created here will be lost. Are you sure you want to exit?

exitTip1.message: Question {n} is not saved. If you exit now, the editing won't be saved. Are you sure you want to exit?

confirmExit.message: Are you sure you want to exit?

joinExamByCode.message: Enter the exam by verification code

networkErrorTip2.message: Network error, the exam cannot be loaded normally. Please check the network and restart the exam after the network is recovered.

networkErrorTip3.message: Data error, the exam cannot be loaded normally. Please contact customer service.

notExitFullScreenTip.message: Do not exit full screen during the exam. Otherwise it will be logged as leaving exam and might be treated as cheating.

submitPaperErrorTip.message: Please do not close the page - The system is submitting your exam!

submitPaperErrorTip2.message: Submission failed. Please do not close the page - The system is re-submitting your exam!

confirmPaperTip1.message: {n}-savol hali javob berilmagan. Imtihonni baribir topshirmoqchimisiz?

timeOverTip.message: Vaqt tugadi. Imtihoningiz 3 soniyadan keyin avtomatik ravishda topshiriladi.

switchPartTipAboutRecording.message: A recording is still in progress. Switching to another section will stop the recording. Are you sure you want to switch?

submitTipAboutUpload.message: File uploading is still in progress - Please submit it later!

saveTipAboutUpload.message: File uploading is still in progress - Please save later!

notExitTip.message: You're not allowed to exit full screen or leave the exam screen during the exam!

leaveTimesTip.message: You've left the exam screen {n} times!

guide1.message: Welcome to the new version of the exam system. Let's take a look at the changes.

guide2.message: On the left , you can add, move and delete exam sections. Click the section name to switch to that section.

guide3.message: Click here to edit the section name and description.

guide4.message: In this new version, you can create and edit questions in the exam directly ! Select a question type here to add a new question. Of course, you can also import questions from the question bank.

guide5.message: New questions created here will not be automatically saved to the question bank. If necessary, you can use the Import from Exam function in the question bank to import the questions from the exam into the question bank.

guide6.message: Batch setting of points per question and number of plays per audio moved here.

guide7.message: Click here to preview the exam when editing.

guide8.message: Remember to click Save after all editing.

paperUsedTip.message: This exam is in use. Only the question stem, answers, and points can be edited. The exam structure cannot be modified. Don't add/delete questions or sub-questions (for combination questions).

cameraErrorTip.message: Camera monitoring error - The camera fails to start. Please check whether: {br}1. Camera access is not enabled. {br}2. The camera is used by another program. {br}3. The network is unavailable. {br}If any of the above exists, please fix it and then click the Continue to Answer button.

bankNameError1.message: The folder name cannot be empty.

bankNameError2.message: The folder name cannot exceed 200 characters.

bankNameError3.message: The folder name cannot contain the following characters: <> *?:" '|/\~.'"

bankNameError4.message: Folders can be added up to 5 levels, the current directory is level {l}, no subfolders can be added to this folder.

writeBankName.message: Click to enter the folder name

importLoadMsg1.message: Please be patient as the export time may be long.

importLoadMsg2.message: Agar brauzeringiz pop-uplarni bloklasa, iltimos, har doim ruxsat berishga sozlang.

paperImportError.message: When you import questions from a exam to this folder, the folder level will exceed the upper limit. The question bank supports up to 5 levels of folders, please reselect a folder to import.

downloadTemplateMsg.message: Download the Excel template, and fill in the questions according to the instructions.

uploadFileError.message: Some of the questions contain invalid data, please check and modify before uploading.

paperChoiceQueMsg1.message: Import up to 200 questions at a time.

paperChoiceQueMsg2.message: Import up to 200 questions at a time.

moveFailMsg1.message: The folder level cannot exceed 5 levels, and the sum of the levels of the target folder and the current folder exceeds the upper limit and cannot be moved.

moveFailMsg2.message: A folder with the same name exists in the target folder and cannot be moved.

choiceTeacherError1.message: Please select the teacher you want to share

choiceTeacherError2.message: Please select the teacher you want to share

queBankEmpty.message: There are no questions in this folder.

deleteConfirmNew.message: Are you sure you want to delete {n}?

deleteConfirm2.message: If you select Delete All, the questions in the folder will be deleted as well.

deleteConfirm6.message: Data cannot be recovered after deletion.

sameQueinPaper.message: Similar question exist in the exam

tagsMsg.message: Tags (Up to 30 characters, hit Enter to add, up to 3 tags):

saveErrorTips2.message: Failed to save some of the quesionts!

numExceededTips.message: Add up to 200 questions at a time.

incompleteMessage1.message: The question title cannot be empty!

incompleteMessage5.message: The choices can not be empty.

incompleteMessage6.message: Click to enter the choice or delete the extra choices.

incompleteMessage7.message: The number of correct answers cannot exceed the number of choices.

incompleteMessage9.message: There are duplicate choices in the answer.

incompleteMessage11.message: The number of correct answers cannot be less than the number of blank items.

completionAnswerTips.message: Note: The answers for the blanks do not need to be in order.

changeScoreText.message: Are you sure to modify points in bulk?

questionEdit1.message: 1. The types of questions supported by this function: Multiple Choice, Multiple Response, True/False, Fill in the Blank, Essay Question.

questionEdit2.message: 2. Only plain text question can be imported. Questions that contain pictures, formulas, videos, and audio are not supported.

questionEdit3.message: 3. There are two ways to add a question: (1) Click on the question type above to add a new question and edit the question according to the template format. (2) Paste the question text  here , and the system will automatically identify the question type and generate the question.

questionEdit4.message: 4. After entering the questions, you can check whether the result indentified by the system is accurate in the preview area on the right, including question type, answer and points. Save after confirmation.

saveOutText.message: You have unsaved question(s) , are you sure you want to quit?

bindDownload.message: Download Moodle Question Bank Conversion Tool

downloadDesc1.message: 1. Download and install the format conversion tool (Windows system only).

downloadDesc2.message: 2. Export the question bank from Moodle into an xml format file. Only the following question types are supported: multiple choice, true/false, short answer, essay.

downloadDesc3.message: 3. Use the format conversion tool to convert the xml file to Excel format.

downloadDesc4.message: 4. Use ULearning's bulk import function to upload the Excel file and import the question bank.

importLoadFirst1.message: 1. With this function, you can export all the questions in this folder and its subfolders.

importLoadFirst2.message: 2. At present, it only supports exporting Excel format, and pictures, audio, video and other attachments of the questions can not be exported.

examUploadTipNew.message: When selecting a file, the page will temporarily exit the full screen, please complete selecting attachments within 60 seconds and return to the exam interface, and then click any blank space on the page to return to full screen, otherwise the system will record the operation as leaving the exam.

remarkScoreTip.message: Please grade according to the specified range.

noSkipping.message: This exam prohibits skipping questions, please answer in order.

networkMsg1.message: The network is unstable, and continuing to answer questions may cause the answer record to be lost.

networkMsg2.message: If the network cannot be restored temporarily, it is recommended to apply to the teacher to withdraw from the exam first, and reschedule the exam later.

submissionExam.message: The exam is submitted involuntarily by the system

submissionExamTip1.message: You have left the exam {n} times. According to the exam monitoring settings, your exam will be submitted involuntarily by the system.

submissionExamTip2.message: You have left the exam for more than {n} seconds. According to the exam monitoring settings, your exam will be submitted involuntarily by the system.

leaveLimitTip.message: Left the exam {n} times and your exam will be submitted involuntarily by the system

leaveLimitTimeTip.message: You have left for {n} seconds. If you leave for more than {m} seconds, your exam will be submitted involuntarily by the system.

uploadFinishTip.message: After selecting the attachment, click Continue to return to the exam.

scanCodeUploadDesc.message: Scan this QR code to upload files to your computer from your mobile device.

scanCodeUploadDesc1.message: The QR code is valid in {num} minutes. You need to reopen the pop-up window if the QR code is expired.

scanCodeUploadTip.message: Use a mobile device to scan the code, or modify the browser device type identifier.

codeUploadTip2.message: Upload up to {num} files at a time.

codeUploadTip4.message: Upload up to {n} attachments per question.

codeUploadTip5.message: The file is being uploaded, please wait until the upload is complete before submitting.

exitUploadTip.message: File not submitted, are you sure to leave?

uploadFailTipNew.message: File upload or transcoding failed, please try to transcode locally first before uploading.

enterCode.message: Please enter the spare verification code for the exam

ownSpieltag.message: Only show the sessions of my classes

commitExamTip1.message: Switched away from the exam screen more times than allowed and the exam was submitted involuntarily.

commitExamTip2.message: Switched away from the exam screen for longer than the time allowed and the exam was submitted involuntarily.

signinCodeTip.message: 1. Iltimos, ULearning APP ni foydalanib kodni skanerlang va kirish. {br}2. Kirgandan so'ng, siz faqat bir xil qurilmadan imtihonga kirishingiz mumkin.

standbyVerificationCodeDesc.message: This verification code can be used to enter the exam when examinees are unable to enter the exam under special circumstances, including: {br}- exams with device/IP monitoring enabled, where examinees need to change devices or IPs  during the exam. {br1}- exams with face recognition enabled, where examinees cannot pass face verification.

standbyVerificationCodeTip.message: The verification code is valid within {minute}, please refresh to get it again after it expires.

enterTip.message: Talaba ID raqami yoki ismini kiriting

tokenTip.message: Siz boshqa qurilmada allaqachon tizimga kirgansiz.

forceSubmitTip.message: The teacher terminates the exam in advance, it will be submitted automatically after {seconds} seconds, please do not leave or close the page.

commitExamTip5.message: Exam submitted involuntarily by the teacher.

forceSubmitTip1.message: The student is answering questions. Using this feature, the student will be forced to submit early. There may be a delay of about 10 seconds to 1 minute. This operation cannot be undone, so please use it with caution.

forceSubmitTip3.message: Are you sure to terminate early?

commitExamTip6.message: Screenshot of the violation, forced submission by the system.

importQueSuccessMsg1.message: Import successfully, and {n} questions are added.

importQueSuccessMsg2.message: Question bank training only supports objective questions and fill-in-the-blank questions, and unsupported question types are automatically skiped.

trainMsg.message: Please select questions from the individual/school question bank. Only course administrators can import/remove questions.

noBank.message: The question bank does not exist.

questionDelete.message: The question has been deleted, please refresh the page and try again.

trainPageTip.message: The question bank training only supports the computer side temporarily.

enteredExamTip1.message: Under special circumstances, you can ask the proctor for a verification code, and use the code to enter the exam.

commitExamTip7.message: Time exhausted, exam submitted by the system automatically.

networkErrorTip4.message: The system has temporarily saved the answer record locally, try to submit it manually again later.

openLockScreenMsg.message: The page will launch the Lockdown Browser.

openLockScreenMsg1.message: If the lockdown browser is not installed or cannot start normally, please download and install the lockdown browser first.

openLockScreenMsg2.message: If it is installed, please {clickHere}, and when the webpage pops up dialog box, click the Open ULearning Lockdown Browser button.

ltiTip3.message: Note: If the lockdown does not log in automatically after startup, you can try to log in by entering the ULearing account. Your user name is {loginName}, and the initial password is consistent with the user name.

openLockScreenError.message: The Lockdown Browser client is not detected，please check if it is installed correctly. If it is installed but still cannot start, try to uninstall and reinstall the latest version.

deletePaperTip.message: The exam paper has already been used and cannot be deleted.

examUploadTip.message: When selecting a file, the system will temporarily exit full screen. Please complete the file selection and return to the exam screen within 30 seconds. Then, click any blank area on the screen to return to full screen. Otherwise the system will log it as leaving exam.

enteredExamTip3.message: Under special circumstances, you can ask the proctor for a verification code, and use the code to enter the exam.

shareFolderDesc.message: Shared folders support team collaboration, you can add shared faculty team members after creation.

usePermission1.message: Available only to the management team

removeMemberTip1.message: Are you sure you want to remove {name}?

questionMoveTip.message: The selected items contain questions or folders created by others and can only be moved within the current shared folder.

deletePaperTip1.message: {name} has already been used and cannot be deleted.

deletePaperTip2.message: {name} is not the creator and cannot be deleted.

deleteFolderIntro1.message: If you select Delete Folder, but Keep Exams, the exams contained in the folder will be moved to the root directory after deletion.

deleteFolderIntro2.message: If you select Delete All, the exams in the folder will be deleted as well.

deleteFolderIntro3.message: Keep the exams and delete the folder only

deleteFolderTip.message:
The folder contains exams created by others and cannot be deleted directly.
To delete please move these exams out of this folder first.

deleteFolderTip1.message: The folder contains used exams and cannot be deleted.

deleteFolderTip2.message: The folder contains abnormal exams and cannot be deleted.

confirmDeleteSelectedTip1.message: The selected item contains exams that have already been used and cannot be deleted in bulk.

confirmDeleteSelectedTip2.message: The selected items contain abnormal exams and cannot be deleted.

deleteShareFolderTip1.message: When you delete a shared folder, the subfolders and exams contained in it will be moved back to the personal directory of each creator and will not be deleted synchronously.

deleteShareFolderTip3.message: When you delete a shared folder, the subfolders and questions contained in it will be moved back to the personal directory of each creator and will not be deleted synchronously.

deleteShareFolderTip2.message: Are you sure you want to delete this shared folder?

exitShareTip.message: Once you exit, you will no longer be able to view and use the exams in this shared folder.

setLockPwTip.message: After you set up a security password, you can secure the selected exam(s) or exam folder(s). The secured exam(s) or folder(s) can only be viewed or unsecured with this password.

lockTip.message: You do not have a recovery email or mobile no with your account. To secure your exams, you need to have a recovery method with your account first.

pwError1.message: The password should be 6-16 numbers or letters

deleteLockPwTip.message: After you remove the security password, all secured exams and folders will be unsecured!

codeInvalid1.message: The verification code has expired, please get it again

selectPaperIntro.message: Select the exam and import the questions from the exam into the current folder.  Selecting up to {n} exams at a time.

insertPaperTip1.message: Bir vaqtning o'zida {n} tagacha imtihonni tanlang

shareBankTip.message: Here are question banks imported from outside and available to teachers across the school.

shareFolderTip1.message: The new version of Shared Folders allows teachers to work together as a team to manage examrs or questions in the same folder. Meanwhile, the original exam/question sharing function has been taken offline. For exams or questions that need to be shared, you can create a Shared Folder, set up the sharing team members, and move the exams/questions to the shared folder.

paperUpdateDesc.message: The original School Exam Bank and Shared Exam Bank functions have been taken offline, please use the Shared Folder in My Exam Bank to share exams with your team.

questionUpdateDesc.message: The original School Question Bank and Shared Queation Bank functions have been taken offline, please use the Shared Folder in My Question Bank to share questions with your team.

moveErrorTip1.message: The exam or folder does not exist.

moveErrorTip4.message: The question or folder does not exist.

isArchiveTip.message: This shared folder has been locked.

appCreateQueMsg.message: The mobile version currently does not support creating questions of other types; please create them from the computer.

queScoreError.message: The score must be between 1 and 100, with one decimal place allowed

moveMsg.message: The selected items contain questions created by others and can only be moved within the current shared folder.

choiceMsg.message: Click on the option to set it as the correct answer

changeTabMsg.message: The edited content will not be saved after switching the question type. Sure about switching?

goBackMsg.message: The question has not been saved, are you sure you want to return?

soundRecording1.message: Recording, click on the ripple to stop

soundRecording3.message: Remarks, not required item, no more than 200 words

deleQueNote.message: Are you sure you want to delete the question?

fileLoading.message: The file is still uploading, please wait.

questionTextType1.message: Generate a question based on the description

questionTextType2.message: Generate questions based on the text

questionTextDesc1.message: Please enter question requirements below (Note that the questions are generated by a large AI model and may not guarantee complete accuracy; it is recommended to review them before saving).

questionTextDesc2.message: Please enter the question requirements below.

questionPlaceholder2.message: Enter text materials, and AI will extract key points from them to generate questions.

completeRemarkTip2.message: All students in the current list have been graded! If you need to continue grading, please exit and re-filter the students.

draftTip.message: Please edit the exam information on your PC

examRoomPlaceholder.message: Please enter exam venue name to search

imgImportTip.message: 1.Please upload a clear image of the exam paper (supports png, jpg, jpeg, max size 512MB). {br}2.The system will automatically recognize questions in the image (supports single-choice, multiple-choice, true/false, fill-in-the-blank, short answer).{br}3. It recognizes printed text and neat handwriting, and converts mathematical formulas to LaTeX format.{br}4. After recognition, please preview and check the content, where you can make edits and corrections.

analysisImgTip.message: Please wait while the title is identified...

imgTypeLimitTip.message: Incorrect image format. Please re-upload an image in png, jpg, or jpeg format.

viewUploadTypeTip.message:
Supports common formats such as images, documents, video, and audio.Maximum 10 attachments per question.Maximum 500MB per file on the desktop client.​For unsupported formats, please compress the file(s) before uploading.
Documents:​ pdf, doc, docx, xls, xlsx, ppt, pptx, txt, psd, xmind, dwg
Images:​ png, jpg, gif, jpeg, bmp
Video:​ mp4, avi, wmv, rm, rmvb, mpeg, mpg, mkv, mov, flv
Audio:​ mp3, wav, wma
Archives:​ zip, rar, 7z
Subtitle Files:​ srt

signinCodeTip1.message: 1. Iltimos, ULearning APP ni foydalanib kodni skanerlang va kirish. {br}2. Kirgandan so'ng, siz faqat bir xil qurilmadan imtihonga kirishingiz mumkin.

confirmClearException.message: Anomaliyani tozalashdan oldin tizim skrinshotlarini har qanday huquqbuzarliklar uchun diqqat bilan ko'rib chiqing. Uni tozalashga ishonchingiz komilmi?

commitExamTip9.message: Ekran kuzatuvchi anomaliyasi chegaraga etdi. Tizim imtihon natijasini majburiy ravishda yuboradi.
